FROM (
  SELECT b.molecule_id, COUNT(b.bond_id) AS dbl_count
  FROM bond AS b
  WHERE b.bond_type = '='
  GROUP BY b.molecule_id
) AS counts
JOIN (
  SELECT MAX(dbl_count) AS max_count

JOIN molecule AS m ON m.molecule_id = counts.molecule_id

question_results.question: For loans contracts which are still running where client are in debt, list the district of the and the state the percentage unemployment rate increment from year 1995 to 1996.
question_results.gold_sql: SELECT CAST((T3.A13 - T3.A12) AS REAL) * 100 / T3.A12 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'
question_results.predicted_sql:
SELECT di.A2 AS district, di.A3 AS state, ((di.A13 - di.A12) / di.A12) * 100.0 AS unemployment_increment_pct
FROM loan AS l
JOIN account AS a ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN disp AS dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client AS c ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN district AS di ON di.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY di.A2, di.A3, di.A12, di.A13
question_results.normalized_sql:
SELECT
  di.A2 AS district,
  di.A3 AS state,
  (
    (
      di.A13 - di.A12
    ) / di.A12
  ) * 100.0 AS unemployment_increment_pct
FROM loan AS l
JOIN account AS a
  ON a.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN disp AS dp
  ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client AS c
  ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN district AS di
  ON di.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE
  l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY
  di.A2,
  di.A3,
  di.A12,
  di.A13
